title: salix annulifera
intro: Salix annulifera, also known as the 'annual willow', is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the willow family (Salicaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it's used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The bark and leaves of the Salix annulifera contain salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, providing anti-inflammatory and analgesic benefits, which can help alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Salix annulifera include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
